title: Implement HapticManager feedback enum
description: Implement Engine/HapticManager.swift per Spec 08 Section 9. Caseless enum with @MainActor static methods: pigSelected (light), purchase/pigSold (medium), birth (heavy), pigdexDiscovery/contractCompleted (notification success), error (notification error). Integration points listed in spec Section 9 table. ~60 lines. iOS-native enhancement (no Python equivalent).

title: Write simulation unit tests (NeedsSystem, Collision, BehaviorDecision, Breeding)
description: Write 4 unit test files from Specs 04-05 §17/§20: NeedsSystemTests.swift (decay rates, personality modifiers, urgency), CollisionTests.swift (spatial grid binning, overlap separation), BehaviorDecisionTests.swift (guard states, Buridan's ass, content throttle), BreedingTests.swift (courtship, pregnancy, auto-pair).
close_reason: Tests are part of each implementation task, not standalone beads

title: Port genetics system (breed, mutations, rarity)
description: Port the 6-locus Mendelian genetics system: breed() function, mutation logic, rarity calculation. 144 phenotype combos (8 colors x 3 patterns x 3 intensities x 2 roan).

title: Implement AdoptionView (bloodline adoption)
description: Implement AdoptionView for adopting pigs from specific bloodlines with known genetics.

title: Implement runtime pattern overlay rendering
description: Implement Scene/PatternRenderer.swift per Spec 03 Section 12. Runtime pattern compositing: applies fur maps + pattern masks to base color sprites. Includes SpriteTextureCache (final class, caches composited SKTexture per pig UUID for reuse). Methods: renderPattern(base:pattern:furMap:) -> SKTexture, cache lookup/invalidation. Tests: cache hit/miss, pattern application.

title: Implement ShopView (4-tab shop)
description: Implement ShopView with 4 tabs: pigs, facilities, biomes, upgrades. Purchase flow with currency validation.

title: Performance test with 50+ pigs
description: Performance test the farm scene with 50+ animated PigNodes. Measure frame rate, memory usage, and identify bottlenecks.

title: Write economy unit tests (Economy, Contracts)
description: Write 2 unit test files from Spec 04 §20: EconomyTests.swift (pig valuation, perk stacking, currency formatting), ContractTests.swift (contract generation, phenotype matching, expiry).
close_reason: Tests are part of each implementation task, not standalone beads

title: Implement GameEngine tick loop
description: Implement GameEngine with configurable tick rate (10 TPS default), 7 speed levels (paused through 900x debug-fast). CADisplayLink or Timer based.

title: Test Swift 6 strict concurrency with SpriteKit scene updates
description: Investigate Swift 6 strict concurrency implications for SpriteKit scene updates. Determine Sendable boundaries and actor isolation strategy.

title: Implement SpriteFurMaps coordinate data
description: Create SpriteFurMaps.swift with enum SpriteFurMaps providing adultInnerFur, babyInnerFur, adultAllFur, babyAllFur, adultEarPixels, babyEarPixels coordinate sets. Populated by export tool from PIG_PIXELS_ADULT. Spec 03 §12.

title: Port GameConfig constants (90+ values)
description: Port all 90+ tuning constants from Python GameConfig to Swift. Use caseless enum namespace pattern.

title: Measure JSON save/load performance with 200+ pigs
description: Performance investigation: benchmark JSON serialization/deserialization with a save file containing 200+ pigs.

title: Write headless simulation integration tests
description: Write integration tests that run the headless simulation for N ticks and verify: pigs move, needs decay/recover, breeding works, economy flows.

title: Implement PigPalettes color dictionaries
description: Create PigPalettes.swift with all 8 base color palette dictionaries and color(for:baseColor:) lookup. Includes UIColor hex extension. Spec 03 §15.

title: Implement AutoResources drip/AoE/veggie systems
description: Implement AutoResources.swift: tickAutoResources (drip system + auto-feeders), tickVeggieGardens (garden production), tickAoEFacilities (Stage audience + Campfire social), applyBulkFeeders. Called in SimulationRunner tick phase 2b. ~130 lines. Spec 04 §13 + Spec 05 §14.

title: Port PigNames name generation
description: Port the PigNames name generation system to Swift. Include all name lists and generation logic.

title: Implement GameState observable container
description: Implement GameState as @Observable class. Central container for all game state: pigs, facilities, grid, economy, tick count.

title: Export terrain tile PNGs (24 image sets)
description: Run export_sprites.py --category terrain to generate 24 terrain tile image sets (8 biomes x 3 tile types: floor, wall, post). Procedurally generated inside the export tool. Output: Assets.xcassets/Sprites/Terrain/. Spec 03 §10.

title: Write Doc 05 — Behavior AI spec
description: Write the behavior AI specification document. Covers BehaviorController, decision tree, movement/seeking, breeding/birth systems.

title: Implement BigPigFarmApp entry point (bootstrapping, NewGameSetup, callbacks)
description: Implement BigPigFarmApp.swift per Spec 08 Section 6. SwiftUI @main App entry point: @State gameState/gameEngine/simulationRunner, SaveManager injection, load-or-create flow, NewGameSetup.configure() for fresh state, event callback wiring. Also includes NewGameSetup enum (starter pigs, facilities, log message). Distinct from ad9 (lifecycle save) which covers only scenePhase observation.

title: Port GameConfig.Tiers data tables (TierUpgrade + RoomCost)
description: Add TierUpgrade struct + tierUpgrades data table (5 entries) and RoomCost struct + roomCosts data table (8 entries) to GameConfigTiers.swift. Spec 02 §5.3.

title: Create facility sprite assets
description: Create sprite assets for all facility types (food bowl, water, toys, shelter, etc.).

title: Implement FarmGrid with cell types
description: Implement Engine/FarmGrid.swift per Spec 04 Sections 3-7. Includes: Cell struct with terrain/facility/wall flags, FarmGrid struct with 2D cell array, facility placement/removal, area management (addArea, getAreaAt, areaLookup), walkable cache (GKGridGraph rebuild), wall flag computation from neighbors, createStarter() for initial room. Tests: cell queries, facility placement, walkable paths, area lookup.

title: Implement AlmanacView (Pigdex + contracts)
description: Implement AlmanacView: Pigdex (collection of discovered phenotypes) and active/completed contracts.

title: Translate all 21 enums to Swift
description: Port all 21 Python enums from the source codebase to Swift. Use Swift enum types with raw values. Ensure Sendable conformance.

title: Generate pattern mask PNGs (6 image sets)
description: Generate 6 pattern mask PNG image sets by analyzing PIG_PIXELS_ADULT fur pixel positions. Masks: dutch/chinchilla/himalayan x adult/baby. Output: Assets.xcassets/Sprites/Patterns/. Spec 03 §11-12.

title: Implement AutoArrange zone-based layout
description: Implement AutoArrange.swift: zone-based facility layout with three modes (small farm, large single-area, multi-area). Shelf-packing algorithm. Zone and Placement structs. Maps from game/auto_arrange.py (787 lines). ~300 lines. Spec 04 §18.

title: Implement SimulationRunner tick orchestration
description: Implement SimulationRunner that orchestrates per-tick updates: needs decay, behavior decisions, movement, collision, breeding, economy.

title: Export portrait sprite PNGs (144 image sets)
description: Run export_sprites.py --category portraits to generate 144 portrait image sets (8 colors x 3 patterns x 3 intensities x 2 roan) with fixed seed 'pigdex_preview'. Output: Assets.xcassets/Sprites/Portraits/. Spec 03 §9.

title: Implement Acclimation biome adoption
description: Implement Acclimation.swift: timer-based biome adoption with updateAcclimation. Color-match acceleration (0.5x multiplier). ~50 lines. Spec 05 §13.

title: Test SpriteView performance with 50+ animated nodes
description: Performance investigation: test SpriteView (SwiftUI-SpriteKit bridge) with 50+ simultaneously animated PigNodes.

title: Implement FacilityNode
description: Implement FacilityNode as SKSpriteNode for facility rendering in the farm scene.

title: Implement AnimationData timing constants
description: Create AnimationData.swift with enum AnimationData providing ticksPerFrame, frameCounts, frameCount(for:), cycleDuration(for:), animatedStates, staticStates, and babyFallbackState(for:). Ports ANIM_TICKS_PER_FRAME / ANIM_FRAME_COUNT from Python. Spec 03 §14.

title: TestFlight build and testing
description: Create TestFlight build, configure App Store Connect, distribute to testers.

title: Implement Adoption business logic (Economy/Adoption.swift)
description: Implement Economy/Adoption.swift per Spec 07 Section 10 and Section 14 (New File Required). Caseless enum with business logic: calculateAdoptionCost(), getAvailableBloodlines(), createAdoptedPig(), isEligibleForAdoption(). Maps from Python game/adoption.py. AdoptionView (bead 0f3) depends on this.

title: Implement BreedingProgram scoring and carrier-aware filter
description: Implement BreedingProgram.swift: shouldKeepPig, breedingValue/diversityValue/moneyValue scoring functions, buildDiversityCounters, heterozygosityCount, carrier-aware matching table. ~300 lines. Spec 05 §15.

title: Profile GKGridGraph vs custom A* on 96x56 grid
description: Performance investigation: compare GKGridGraph pathfinding vs custom A* implementation on a 96x56 cell grid. Measure time per query, memory usage.

title: Implement StatusBarView (HUD overlay)
description: Implement StatusBarView as SwiftUI HUD overlay showing currency, pig count, day/time, speed controls.

title: Add app icon
description: Create and add app icon to Assets.xcassets. All required sizes for iOS.

title: Write Doc 07 — SwiftUI Screens spec
description: Write the SwiftUI screens specification document. Covers StatusBarView, ShopView, PigListView, PigDetailView, BreedingView, AlmanacView, BiomeSelectView, AdoptionView, and SharedComponents.

title: Implement FacilityManager scoring
description: Implement Simulation/FacilityManager.swift per Spec 04 Section 14. Maps from Python game/facility_manager.py (858 lines). Includes: facility scoring with distance weights, path caching (LRU optional), straight-line shortcut for nearby facilities, occupancy tracking per facility, arrival handling + resource consumption, alternative facility search when occupied, cleanup on pig removal. One of the largest single files. Tests: scoring, occupancy, alternative search.

title: Write sprite asset tests (SpriteAssetTests.swift)
description: Write SpriteAssetTests.swift with 5 @Test functions: adultPigTexturesLoad, babyPigTexturesLoad, facilityTexturesLoad, indicatorTexturesLoad, animationDataConsistency. Spec 03 §16.
close_reason: Tests are part of each implementation task, not standalone beads

title: Implement BiomeSelectView (biome picker)
description: Implement BiomeSelectView for choosing biome type when expanding the farm grid.

title: Implement SaveManager (JSON save/load)
description: Implement Engine/SaveManager.swift per Spec 08 Section 2. Struct with baseDirectoryURL (injectable for tests), save/load/saveData/hasSave/deleteSave methods. Uses atomic writes, backup-before-overwrite, corruption recovery (fallback to .bak). Tests: SaveManagerTests.swift with 10+ test cases (roundtrip empty/pigs/facilities, backup created, corrupted save, fallback to backup, delete, hasSave). All tests use makeTempSaveManager() for isolation.

title: Implement BreedingView (pair selection)
description: Implement Views/BreedingView.swift per Spec 07 Section 7. Combines Python breeding.py (571 lines) + breeding_program_panel.py (280 lines) into one SwiftUI view. Includes: pair selection grid with compatibility indicators, breeding program config (target phenotype, generation tracking), offspring prediction display, active program status. Tests: compatibility filtering, cost calculation.

title: Implement app lifecycle save
description: Implement scenePhase lifecycle observation per Spec 08 Section 6. Adds handleScenePhaseChange (pause on inactive, synchronous save on background, resume on active) and lifecycleSave() to BigPigFarmApp. Both methods require @MainActor. Depends on BigPigFarmApp entry point (bead 51h) existing first.

title: Implement touch handling
description: Implement touch handling: tap pig to select, tap ground to place facility. Coordinate with CameraController gestures.

title: Write Doc 08 — Persistence & Polish spec
description: Write the persistence and polish specification document. Covers SaveManager, app lifecycle save, auto-save, app icon, polish, and TestFlight.

title: Evaluate CADisplayLink vs Timer for tick loop precision
description: Performance investigation: compare CADisplayLink vs Timer for the 10 TPS game tick loop. Measure jitter, CPU overhead.

title: Implement PigListView (sortable list)
description: Implement PigListView with sortable/filterable list of all pigs. Sort by name, age, rarity, happiness.

title: Implement Culling surplus management
description: Implement Culling.swift: cullSurplusBreeders with gender balance preservation, sellMarkedAdults, active replacement, three scoring strategies (breedingValue, diversityValue, moneyValue). ~200 lines. Spec 05 §12.

title: Implement BehaviorMovement + seeking
description: Implement BehaviorMovement.swift (caseless enum, multi-waypoint movement, dodge system, biome-biased wandering with A* homing) + BehaviorSeeking.swift (caseless enum, facility/social/courtship seeking with unreachable backoff). Two files. Current stubs are structs — must change to caseless enums. Spec 05 §6-7.

title: Implement FarmScene (SKScene + tile map)
description: Implement FarmScene as SKScene with SKTileMapNode for terrain rendering. Bridge FarmGrid data to visual tile map.

title: Write Phase 0 unit tests (ConfigTests, ModelTests, PigNamesTests)
description: Write 3 test files specified in Spec 02 §8: ConfigTests.swift (10 tests verifying constant values and namespace structure), ModelTests.swift (11 tests for GuineaPig, Facility, FarmArea, Pigdex), PigNamesTests.swift (4 tests for name generation).
close_reason: Tests are part of each implementation task, not standalone beads

title: Write engine unit tests (GameState, FarmGrid, Pathfinding, GridExpansion)
description: Write 4 unit test files from Spec 04 §20: GameStateTests.swift (pig/facility CRUD, money ops, affinity keys), FarmGridTests.swift (cell queries, facility placement, walkability), PathfindingTests.swift (GKGridGraph, findPath, nearest walkable), GridExpansionTests.swift (expandGrid, room addition).
close_reason: Tests are part of each implementation task, not standalone beads

title: Implement Breeding + Birth systems
description: Implement breeding system: pair matching, gestation, birth events. Integrates with genetics system.

title: Write Doc 06 — Farm Scene spec
description: Write the farm scene specification document. Covers FarmScene, PigNode, FacilityNode, CameraController, SpriteView integration, and touch handling.

title: Implement CameraController (pan/zoom/bounds)
description: Implement camera controller with pan gestures, pinch zoom, and boundary clamping to keep view within farm bounds.

title: Implement auto-save (every 300 ticks)
description: Implement auto-save that triggers every 300 ticks of simulation time.

title: Implement GridExpansion tier system
description: Implement Engine/GridExpansion.swift per Spec 04 Section 8. 2-column grid layout computation, room addition with entity relocation (pig/facility position deltas), canvas resize, tunnel reconnection. Returns roomDeltas for callers to relocate entities. Includes computeGridLayout() for area positioning and addRoom() orchestration. Tests: layout calculation, entity relocation, multi-area expansion.

title: Write Doc 04 — Game Engine spec
description: Write the game engine specification document. Covers GameState, GameEngine tick loop, FarmGrid, pathfinding, tunnels, expansion, needs system, simulation runner, collision, economy, and facility management.

title: Implement GridPosition value type
description: Implement Models/GridPosition.swift per Spec 02 Section 7. Simple value type (~30 lines): struct GridPosition with x/y Int coordinates, Hashable/Codable/Sendable conformance. Used by Pathfinding, FarmGrid, Collision, and nearly every grid-based system. Foundational dependency — must exist before FarmGrid compiles.

title: Implement Shop extensions for ShopView (5 new methods)
description: Add 5 methods to Economy/Shop.swift per Spec 07 Section 4: findPlacementPosition(for:in:), getAvailablePerks(state:), purchasePerk(_:state:), getFarmUpgradeInfo(state:), facilityCost(_:state:). These are required before ShopView can compile — the view calls them for purchase flow, tier gating, and placement. Delta to existing Shop implementation (bead wt4).

title: Export indicator sprite PNGs (12 image sets)
description: Run export_sprites.py --category indicators to generate 12 indicator image sets (6 types x 2 brightness) at @1x/@2x/@3x. Output: Assets.xcassets/Sprites/Indicators/. Spec 03 §8.

title: Implement Collision spatial hash
description: Implement Collision.swift with TWO types: SpatialGrid (struct, uniform hash grid, cell size 5) for O(n*k) spatial queries, and CollisionHandler (final class) with tiered blocking/separation thresholds (5 tiers based on movement state). Spec 05 §9. Note: current stub is a single struct — must split into two types.

title: Implement PigNode (animated sprite)
description: Implement PigNode as SKSpriteNode with animation support. Apply base color + pattern overlay textures.

title: Generate 8 base color variant PNGs
description: Generate 8 base color variant PNG sprite sheets for pig rendering.

title: Implement SharedComponents (currency, badges, bars)
description: Implement Views/SharedComponents.swift per Spec 07 Section 12. Contains 7+ reusable components: CurrencyLabel, NeedBar, RarityBadge, BreedingStatusLabel, FacilityBonusLabel, PigPortraitView (renders portrait sprite for pig), plus free formatting functions (formatMoney, formatDuration, formatPercentage). ~200 lines. Used across all other views.

title: Implement Tunnels and AreaManager
description: Implement tunnel system connecting grid areas and AreaManager for multi-area support.

title: Implement SpriteAssets loading API
description: Create SpriteAssets.swift with enum SpriteAssets providing pigTexture, pigAnimationFrames, facilityTexture, indicatorTexture, portraitTexture, terrainTexture loading functions. Spec 03 §13.

title: Implement GameState+Codable (CodableSnapshot, SaveEnvelope, encodeToJSON)
description: Implement Engine/GameState+Codable.swift per Spec 08 Section 3. Contains CodableSnapshot (Sendable struct mirroring GameState persistent fields with auto-synthesized Codable), SaveEnvelope (versioned wrapper), GameState.encodeToJSON() (@MainActor helper), and GameState.fromSnapshot() (restore from decoded snapshot). ~150 lines. Tests: roundtrip encode/decode in SaveManagerTests.

title: Implement SaveMigration (relayout, resize, orphan pig clamping)
description: Implement Engine/SaveMigration.swift per Spec 08 Section 8. Caseless enum with 3 static migration functions: relayoutAreas (2-column grid migration), resizeAllRooms (tier dimension sync), clampOrphanedPigs (non-walkable cell rescue). All mutations go through state.farm directly (FarmGrid is a struct). ~100 lines. Called by SaveManager.loadFromURL() after JSON decoding.

title: Implement Pathfinding (GKGridGraph)
description: Implement pathfinding using GameplayKit GKGridGraph. Profile performance on 96x56 grid.

title: Translate all 19 Pydantic models to Swift structs
description: Port all 19 Pydantic model classes to Swift structs. Use Codable + Sendable conformance. Follow Doc 02 Data Models spec.

title: Write genetics comparison tests
description: Write Swift Testing tests for genetics system. Compare output parity with Python implementation for breeding, mutations, and rarity calculations.

title: Polish animations and transitions
description: Polish SwiftUI transitions, SpriteKit animations, screen transitions, and overall visual feel.

title: Create Python sprite export tool
description: Create Python tool to export pig sprites from half-block character data to PNG files.

title: Write Doc 03 — Sprite Pipeline spec
description: Write the sprite pipeline specification document. Covers Python export tool, base color variants, atlas creation, runtime pattern overlays, and facility sprites.

title: Wire SpriteView into ContentView
description: Wire SpriteKit SpriteView into SwiftUI ContentView. Handle SwiftUI/SpriteKit bridge with .sheet overlays.

title: Implement Shop, Market, Contracts, Upgrades
description: Implement 5 economy files: Shop.swift (ShopItem struct + shopItems table), Market.swift (pig valuation, sale processing, SaleResult struct), Contracts.swift (BreedingContract + ContractBoard structs, matching logic), Upgrades.swift (UpgradeDefinition struct + 24 upgrade entries), Currency.swift (formatMoney/formatCurrency). Spec 04 §14-17. Consider splitting if scope is too large.

title: Create sprite atlas for Xcode (Assets.xcassets)
description: Create Xcode sprite atlas from generated PNGs. Configure in Assets.xcassets for efficient GPU batching.

title: Implement PigDetailView (stats + genetics)
description: Implement PigDetailView showing full pig stats, genetics breakdown, lineage, and actions (sell, rename).

title: Implement BehaviorController + decision tree
description: Implement BehaviorController.swift (final class, coordinator with per-pig tracking state) + BehaviorDecision.swift (caseless enum, 12-phase priority-based decision tree with guard states). Two files. Current stubs are structs — must change to class and caseless enum. Spec 05 §4-5.

title: Implement NeedsSystem (decay/recovery)
description: Implement pig needs system: hunger, thirst, comfort, entertainment. Decay rates and recovery when needs are met.

title: Implement context protocols (NeedsContext, BreedingContext, BirthContext, CullingContext)
description: Implement Protocols.swift: four narrow context protocols (NeedsContext, BreedingContext, BirthContext, CullingContext) that decouple simulation subsystems from GameState. GameState adds conformance. ~80 lines. Maps from game/facades.py. Spec 04 §19.

title: Port GameConfig.Behavior constants (~50 values)
description: Create GameConfigBehavior.swift with ~50 behavior AI constants. Spec 02 §5.2. Separate file from GameConfig.swift to stay under 300 lines. Maps BEHAVIOR.* Python constants to GameConfig.Behavior namespace.

title: Determine SKShader vs alpha compositing for pattern overlays
description: Performance investigation: compare SKShader-based pattern overlays vs alpha compositing approach. Measure GPU impact with 50+ sprites.
